title: RAG-Augmented Reasoning Techniques for Multimodal Fact-Checking in Political Domain

defines.name: RAGAR
defines.definition: A multimodal RAG-based reasoning framework for fact-checking claims by combining claim verbalization, external retrieval, and stepwise reasoning.

defines.name: Chain of RAG (CoRAG)
defines.definition: A sequential reasoning strategy that answers successive fact-checking subquestions using prior retrieval evidence.

defines.name: Tree of RAG (ToRAG)
defines.definition: A branching reasoning strategy that explores multiple retrieval-and-reasoning paths for multimodal fact-checking.

problem: Existing RAG-based fact-checking approaches are mostly text-only and do not adequately handle the more challenging multimodal setting with elaborate reasoning over visual and textual evidence.
